mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, address AS address, phone AS phone, business_hours AS businessHours, created_at AS createdAt FROM stores ORDER BY store_id ASC
SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, address AS address, phone AS phone, business_hours AS businessHours, created_at AS createdAt FROM stores WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE stores SET store_name = #{storeName}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, business_hours = #{businessHours} WHERE store_id = #{storeId}

UPDATE store_product SET store_product_price = #{requestDTO.storeProductPrice}, store_product_status = #{requestDTO.storeProductStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND store_product_id = #{storeProductId}
